prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your pet care forward
items: Research and create a list of 3 local veterinarians, including their specialties, hours, and emergency services
Calculate and set up a monthly pet care budget including food, medical expenses, grooming, and emergency fund
Create a comprehensive pet care schedule including feeding times, exercise routines, grooming needs, and medication reminders
Pet-proof your home by identifying and securing potential hazards including toxic plants, electrical cords, and small objects
